testcase.name: getSingleUserTest
testcase.system-out:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Fri, 12 Jun 2026 07:43:19 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true Cache-Control: max-age=43200 Etag: W/"1fd-XTG63SYhaP/Uo6/vgmARnL3rpBk" Expires: -1 Nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} Pragma: no-cache Report-To: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=RAist09cDIxgs1ZBd%2BGEfNWyJVqGI%2FUdky2dWGl1Pbo%3D\u0026sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d\u0026ts=1781194032"}],"max_age":3600} Reporting-Endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=RAist09cDIxgs1ZBd%2BGEfNWyJVqGI%2FUdky2dWGl1Pbo%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1781194032" Server: cloudflare Vary: Origin, Accept-Encoding Via: 2.0 heroku-router X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-Powered-By: Express X-Ratelimit-Limit: 1000 X-Ratelimit-Remaining: 974 X-Ratelimit-Reset: 1781194069 Age: 20348 Cf-Cache-Status: HIT Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: a0a7395328b8ed29-MXP alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "id": 2, "name": "Ervin Howell", "username": "Antonette", "email": "Shanna@melissa.tv", "address": { "street": "Victor Plains", "suite": "Suite 879", "city": "Wisokyburgh", "zipcode": "90566-7771", "geo": { "lat": "-43.9509", "lng": "-34.4618" } }, "phone": "010-692-6593 x09125", "website": "anastasia.net", "company": { "name": "Deckow-Crist", "catchPhrase": "Proactive didactic contingency", "bs": "synergize scalable supply-chains" } }

testcase.name: createPostTest
testcase.system-out:
HTTP/1.1 201 Created Date: Fri, 12 Jun 2026 07:43:20 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 96 Connection: keep-alive Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Location Cache-Control: no-cache Etag: W/"60-Lanw15vZ1ExhycL2p0uf3qyx4lo" Expires: -1 Location: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/101 Nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} Pragma: no-cache Report-To: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=EMm0T74DO4r4W7Eq%2FoW6hMjflha%2BonyxKG6%2FwMPS%2Btg%3D\u0026sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d\u0026ts=1781250200"}],"max_age":3600} Reporting-Endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=EMm0T74DO4r4W7Eq%2FoW6hMjflha%2BonyxKG6%2FwMPS%2Btg%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1781250200" Server: cloudflare Vary: Origin, X-HTTP-Method-Override, Accept-Encoding Via: 2.0 heroku-router X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-Powered-By: Express X-Ratelimit-Limit: 1000 X-Ratelimit-Remaining: 998 X-Ratelimit-Reset: 1781250224 Cf-Cache-Status: DYNAMIC CF-RAY: a0a7395a3915ed4b-MXP alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "title": "otomasyon", "body": "testimiz basariyla calisiyor", "userId": 1, "id": 101 }
